posts.highlight: 草莓小北极熊 · 夏日散步装备就位
posts.description: Strawberry the Bichon dressed as a fluffy polar bear cub in a cool summer walking jacket, ready for a walk
posts.description_zh: 草莓比熊穿上夏日凉感散步外套，活像一只小北极熊，散步准备完毕🐻‍❄️
posts.caption_en:
복슬한 우리집 곰돌이 🐻‍❄️ 산책 준비 완료 🌱

여름에도 신나게 산책해야 하니까..
시원한 쿨 워크자켓 입고 나가기 🤍

🧊 @smallstuff_official #스몰스터프 #강아지옷 #강아지하네스
posts.caption_zh:
我们家蓬松小熊 🐻‍❄️ 散步准备完毕 🌱

夏天也要开心散步..
穿上凉感散步外套出发 🤍

🧊 @smallstuff_official #宠物服装 #狗狗背带
posts.westie_prompt: A West Highland White Terrier, pure white fluffy fur, bright eyes, small black nose. Scene inspired by: Strawberry the Bichon dressed as a fluffy polar bear cub in a cool summer walking jacket, ready for a walk. posts.highlight: 콩콩이到底有多好看 · 韩系宠物写真
posts.description: Korean dog named Kongkongi (Beany) photographed beautifully, couple and their fluffy dog in warm aesthetic
posts.description_zh: 韩国狗狗콩콩이的宠物写真，主人和蓬松爱犬的温馨日常，画面精致治愈
posts.caption_en:
우리 콩콩이 이쁘다~~ 한장만 더 찍자♡

#커플 #사진작가
posts.caption_zh:
我们的콩콩이好好看~~ 再多拍一张♡
